zh.lifeSummary: 當Mildred Bourne於1455年出生在英國英格蘭肯特希廷波恩時，她的父親Bartholomew Bourne28歲，母親Elizabeth Warre24歲。她和Sir Lewis De Clifford Sheriff Of Kent至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1505年在英國英格蘭肯特波炳享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mildred Bourne于1455年出生在英国英格兰肯特希廷波恩时，她的父亲Bartholomew Bourne28岁，母亲Elizabeth Warre24岁。她和Sir Lewis De Clifford Sheriff Of Kent至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1505年在英国英格兰肯特波炳享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from southern Middle English bourne, Old English burna, burne ‘spring, stream’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Bourn in Cambridgeshire or Bourne in Lincolnshire. In surnames the reference is often to an old stream called burna, surviving as the name of a farm. This word was replaced as the general word for a stream in southern dialects by Old English brōc (see Brook ) and came to be restricted in meaning to a stream flowing only intermittently, especially in winter.

variants.name: Burn
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): variant of   Bourne  .

variants.name: Born
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Heinz, Helmut, Berthold, Frieda, Friedrich, Fritz, Gerhard, Horst, Jutta.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French borgne ‘one-eyed, squint-eyed’.

variants.name: Cockburn
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and northern English: habitational name from a place in Berwickshire named Cockburn, from Old English cocc ‘cock, rooster’ (or the related byname Cocca) + burna ‘stream’ (see Bourne ). This surname is traditionally pronounced Coburn.

variants.name: Bournes
meanings: English: variant of Bourne with plural or post-medieval exrescent -s.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Mildred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name Mildþrӯð, derived from mild ‘gentle’ + þrӯð ‘strength’. This was the name of a 7th-century abbess, who had a less famous but equally saintly elder sister called Mildburh and a younger sister called Mildgӯð; all were daughters of a certain Queen Ermenburh . Their names illustrate clearly the Old English pattern of combining and recombining the same small group of name elements within a single family. This name was in fairly regular localized use until the early 18th century and it enjoyed a strong revival throughout England in the 19th century. Its use declined from the 1930s onwards.

en.lifeSummary: When Mildred Bourne was born in 1455, in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Bartholomew Bourne, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Warre, was 24. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Lewis De Clifford Sheriff Of Kent. She died in 1505, in Bobbing, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mildred Bourne est née en 1455, à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bartholomew Bourne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Warre, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Lewis De Clifford Sheriff Of Kent. Elle est décédée en 1505, à Bobbing, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mildred Bourne 1455 in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew Bourne 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Warre 24. Sie hatte mit Sir Lewis De Clifford Sheriff Of Kent mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1505 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Bobbing, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mildred Bourne è nata il nel 1455 nel Sittingbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Bartholomew Bourne, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Warre, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Lewis De Clifford Sheriff Of Kent. Morì nel 1505, nel Bobbing, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mildred Bourne(이)가 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 짓틴그보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew Bourne(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Warre(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Sir Lewis De Clifford Sheriff Of Kent(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 보브빙에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mildred Bourne родилась в 1455 г. в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Bartholomew Bourne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Warre, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Sir Lewis De Clifford Sheriff Of Kent. Она умерла в 1505 г. в местности боббинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
